2302860.name: The Wolf of Derevnya Demo
2302860.description:
A jaded hero from an earlier age.

A village beset by a mysterious monster.

And secrets as deep as the earth.

When the villagers of Derevnya begin turning up maimed, suspicion falls on you. Track down the beast to clear your name and save the village—but to unravel the mystery, you will need to confront your own past.

Nightwell Games' inaugural title is a survival-horror choose your own adventure set in the rich medieval world of Kievan Rus'.

This demo includes the full first chapter as a downloadable game for Windows in 1920x1080 fullscreen format. It does not contain any additional features.
